subject: Excited to connect at the conference, Marco Quacken
body:
Hi Marco Quacken,

Saw you'll be at the conference and noticed your work at Independent Investor. Would love to swap notes on Potential Customer, Stage: Angel/Seed.

[Lightfern will polish this in Gmail]
